title: Cobblemon Accessories & More
description: Remodels and Retextures for multiple Cobblemon Addons including Mega Showdown, Cobblemon Parts Refabricated, ATMxMSD, Pokeblocks & Cobblemon Pokenav!
body:
This Resource Pack remodels, retextures and even edits the lang file of multiple addons to the [Cobblemon](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon) mod in order to be more pixel consistent, low poly and more accurate to the Minecraft style (or as close as I could get it). It also removes references to anime/game characters so it feels like you're less cosplaying them and more making these items your own! 

This is designed to be used alongside [Cobblemon Interface](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/cobblemon-interface) for the Accessories GUI colours but these textures can be removed to be used without it.

---
**[Cobblemon Mega Showdown](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon-mega-showdown)**
- Accessories GUI Slot
- Adamant Crystal (**1.6.1 ONLY**)
- Adrenaline Orb
- All Mega Keystone items (2D + 3D)
- All Rotom Unit item textures
- All Z Rings (2D + 3D)
- Archie's Anchor (Now "Mega Anchor) (2D + 3D)
- Ash Cap (Now "Legendary Cap")
- Brendan's Mega Bracelet
- Deoxys Meteorite (Uses the Mega Meteoroid Texture with colours from the original games)
- DNA Splicer
- Dormant Crystal
- Dynamax Band
- Dynamax Candy
- Furfrou Upgrade (**1.6.1 ONLY**)
- Gracidea Flower
- Keystone
- Liko's Pendant (Now "Mysterious Pendant")
- Lustrous Globe
- Lustrous Orb
- Max Honey
- Max Mushroom
- Max Soup
- Maxie Glasses (Now "Mega Glasses") (2D + 3D)
- May's Mega Bracelet (Now "Fluffy Mega Bracelet") (2D + 3D)
- Mega Crystal (Recoloured & edited)
- Meltan (**1.6.1 ONLY**)
- N-Lunarizer and N-Solarizer
- Omni Ring (2D + 3D)
- Oricorio Nectars (with unique pot patterns based on the feather designs)
- Pedestal
- Pika Case (Now "Costume Box (Pikachu)" to align with ATMxMSD)
- Power Spot
- Rusted Sword & Shield (Not retextured, repositioned to be held like a sword & shield)
- Scroll of Darkness & Scroll of Waters (**1.6.1 ONLY**)
- Sparkling Stones (Light & Dark)
- Soul Dew
- Star Core
- Tera Bags
- Tera Orb
- Zygarde Cube

**[Cobblemon](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon)**
- Tatami Blocks renamed to "Hearty Tatami" to better differentiate from Farmer's Delight Tatami

**[All The Mons x Mega Showdown](https://modrinth.com/datapack/allthemons-x-mega-showdown-legacy)**
- Time Gear
- Water Shuriken

**[Cobbreeding](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobbreeding)**
- All Eggs
- GUI Parity

**[Cobblemon Fight or Flight Reborn](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon-fight-or-flight-reborn)**
- PokeStaff (Now "Poké Flute")
- Oran Lucky Egg

**[Berry Pouch](https://modrinth.com/mod/berry-pouch)**
- Accessories GUI Slot

**[Cobblemon Pokenav](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon-pokenav)**
- All items
- GUI Tweaks & Edits

**[Every Compat](https://modrinth.com/mod/every-compat)**
- Apricorn and Saccarine Wood given custom textures for [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create) Window and [Farmer's Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight) Cabinet compatibility blocks

**[Cobblemon Parts Refabricated](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon-parts-refabricated)**
- All Hammers
- Masterwork Blueprint
- Mysterious Keycard

**[Pokeblocks](https://modrinth.com/mod/pokeblocks)**
- Dime
- Nickel
- Pokecoin
- Poke Egg
- Radient Voucher
- Raid Pass
- Raid Voucher
- Summer Raid Soul
- Summer Token

**[Z-A Megas Early](https://modrinth.com/datapack/zamegasearly)**
- All Mega Stones (**v3 and prior only**)

---
Please do not redistribute. You are free to use in modpacks and can be used in content creations (streams, videos etc), both with approrpriate credit to both myself and the original mod authors!
